description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on every pull request. The workflow should have two jobs: 'test' and 'test-32bit'. The 'test' job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with Python versions 3.8 to 3.12, and runs unit tests for indexed_gzip with different arguments. The 'test-32bit' job runs on a 32-bit ubuntu container with Python 3.9 and runs similar unit tests.
